title: Code of Civil Procedure
doc_html:
§1367.13. Code of Civil Procedure

            Any procedural matter not specifically provided for in this Subpart shall be governed by the Code of Civil Procedure.

            Acts 2025, No. 208, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
doc_text:
§1367.13.  Code of Civil Procedure
Any procedural matter not specifically provided for in this Subpart shall be governed
by the Code of Civil Procedure.
Acts 2025, No. 208, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
